raw: {"perspective": "Code Quality Engineer", "vote": "amended-yes", "amendment_if_yes_amended": "A) 83(b) verification + Mercury bank research, but only after a 2-SQL-query sanity check to ensure the migration premise aligns with the current DB state", "rationale": "Preventing production regression and financial loss due to potential duplicate filings, as seen in Class 20 lessons", "risk_if_other_side_wins": "Ignoring the sanity check could lead to a production incident, similar to the one caught by the verify-before-save gate in Class 20", "constitutional_violations_detected": "None", "whistleblower_flag": "null"}
amendment_if_yes_amended: A) 83(b) verification + Mercury bank research, but only after a 2-SQL-query sanity check to ensure the migration premise aligns with the current DB state
rationale: Preventing production regression and financial loss due to potential duplicate filings, as seen in Class 20 lessons
risk_if_other_side_wins: Ignoring the sanity check could lead to a production incident, similar to the one caught by the verify-before-save gate in Class 20
